description.value:
Disease: Rotting Plague — Severity: [Serious]

The character has been exposed to Rotting Plague but shows no symptoms yet. The disease is incubating. At the end of the incubation period, Stage 1 effects begin.

Vector: Undead claws, corpse-handling without protection, necrotic wounds

Incubation: Roll 2d8 days.

system.vector: Undead claws, corpse-handling without protection, necrotic wounds
